"use strict";
/**
 * GameLaunchModule — 游戏启动模块公共 API
 *
 * 使用方式：
 *   import { GameLaunchModule, GAME_LAUNCH_MODULE_NAME } from "../GameLaunchModule";
 *   manager.registerModule(new GameLaunchModule());
 *   const launch = manager.getModule<GameLaunchModule>(GAME_LAUNCH_MODULE_NAME);
 */
